response.justification: Exceptionally experienced full-stack developer (19+ years) with strong alignment on primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) and current AI-agent infrastructure work. Missing explicit experience with Nest.js, PostgreSQL, and specific testing frameworks, but these are readily learnable for someone at this seniority level. Would be an excellent fit for a mid-senior individual contributor role.
strengths: 19+ years full-stack experience across multiple senior/staff roles, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Strong primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) with proven AI-agent development expertise in current role
Deep problem-solving and architecture skills demonstrated through micro-services infrastructure, performance optimization, and technical thought leadership
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience; primary backend framework for role not demonstrated despite strong Node.js/TypeScript background
PostgreSQL absent from resume; only MongoDB and MySQL listed, requiring database-specific knowledge acquisition
Specific testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not detailed despite demonstrated strong TDD culture and testing workshops
